name: 2010 ACR/EULAR Classification Criteria for Rheumatoid Arthritis
classification_rule: Target population: patients with at least 1 joint with definite clinical synovitis, not better explained by another disease. Score across 4 domains (joint involvement, serology, acute-phase reactants, symptom duration). Score ≥6/10 = classify as definite RA.
target_population: At least 1 joint with definite clinical synovitis (swelling)
Synovitis not better explained by another disease

serology.label: Low-positive RF or low-positive anti-CCP (≤3× ULN)
High-positive RF or high-positive anti-CCP (>3× ULN)

todo: Encode joint-count engine (PIP/MCP/wrist/MTP = small; shoulder/elbow/hip/knee/ankle = large) — Day 2.

references.title: 2010 Rheumatoid arthritis classification criteria: an American College of Rheumatology/European League Against Rheumatism collaborative initiative
references.authors: Aletaha D, Neogi T, Silman AJ, et al.
references.why_it_matters: Replaces 1987 ACR criteria. Shifts emphasis to earlier, treatable disease — enables classification before joint erosion develops. The reference classification for modern RA trials and registries.

references.title: Rheumatoid arthritis
references.authors: Smolen JS, Aletaha D, McInnes IB
references.why_it_matters: Definitive Lancet seminar review of RA — epidemiology, genetics, pathogenesis, diagnosis, treat-to-target strategy, csDMARDs/bDMARDs/tsDMARDs.

references.title: EULAR recommendations for the management of rheumatoid arthritis with synthetic and biological disease-modifying antirheumatic drugs: 2022 update
references.authors: Smolen JS, Landewé RBM, Bergstra SA, et al.
references.why_it_matters: Current EULAR guidance: methotrexate + short-term GC first line, then bDMARD/tsDMARD for treatment failure, treat-to-target (remission or low disease activity).

references.title: Rheumatoid arthritis
references.authors: Smolen JS, Aletaha D, Barton A, et al.
references.why_it_matters: Comprehensive Nature Primer on RA — reference for mechanism, imaging, biomarkers.

references.title: Citrulline is an essential constituent of antigenic determinants recognized by rheumatoid arthritis-specific autoantibodies
references.authors: Schellekens GA, de Jong BA, van den Hoogen FH, van de Putte LB, van Venrooij WJ
references.why_it_matters: Landmark mechanistic paper identifying citrulline as the essential antigenic determinant recognised by RA-specific autoantibodies. Established the rationale for anti-CCP serology, which carries the heaviest serologic weight in the 2010 criteria (specificity >95%; often positive years before clinical disease).
